rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using only visible identifiers and component-type-scoped features; avoid implementation-level subcomponent paths in type scopes.
Use 'assume' and 'guarantee' to express input envelopes and output dependencies when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided.
generic_rules: Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in guarantees; do not reference internal subcomponents.
Declare constants and equations using only AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **};
Use 'const name : type = value;' for literals and 'eq name : type = expression;' for derived relations.
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type annexes without intermediate visible outputs.
